setup_text: The area beyond distance 5 of any setup-area edge is the Ambush Zone, marked with objective tokens. Players deploy all ships before squadrons. The first player must deploy ships in the Ambush Zone on odd-numbered deployment turns, starting with the first turn.
special_rule_text: First-player ships and squadrons cannot deploy overlapping obstacles in the Ambush Zone. Remove the Ambush Zone objective tokens after setup.
clarifications: After a player has placed all ships, that player begins placing squadrons on their next deployment turn while the other player continues placing ships until all ships are placed.
The first player can deploy squadrons within distance 1-2 of a ship inside the Ambush Zone.
If a required Ambush Zone ship cannot fit without overlapping obstacles or leaving the zone, place it as completely inside the Ambush Zone as possible.
This objective is not recommended for Task Force play.

rules_integration.notes: Static catalog metadata only; gameplay rule integration is deferred to RuleRegistry.

rule_surfaces.summary: Validate ship-before-squadron order, odd first-player Ambush Zone deployments, and no Ambush Zone obstacle overlaps.
